title: OAU General Studies & History
description: Essential questions on OAU history, campus facts, and general stress patterns.

questions.question: In what year was the University of Ife (now Obafemi Awolowo University) founded?

title: Use of English I
description: Official communication and academic English patterns for OAU 100 level students.

questions.question: Which of the following is correct regarding concord?
options: The boy along with his friends are coming
The boy along with his friends is coming
The boy along with his friend are coming
The boys along with his friend is coming

questions.question: Choose the correct option: 'Either the students or the teacher ___ responsible.'

'The panel ___ submitted its report.'

Choose the correct option: 'If I ___ a bird, I would fly.'
